---
title: "Face à l'adversité"
author: "granPiero"
date: "2024-10-12"
categories: [org]
image: "todo.jpg"
execute: 
  echo: false
format: 
  html:
    comments:
      utterances: 
        repo: "fischerpj/ynot"
---

```{r}
# install.packages("treemapify")
library(ggplot2)
library(treemapify)

df <- data.frame(
  label = c('Guerre','Maladie','Finances','Relations','Moi','Persécution','Catastrophes','Cqrd','Spirituel')
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(  
    random = 100*runif(length(label)),
    value= random/sum(random)
  )

ggplot(df, aes(area = value, fill = label, label = label)) +
  geom_treemap() +
  geom_treemap_text(colour ="black", place = "centre") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
